title: BEM-728 trigger Claude
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/autonomy','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 13:38 (UTC+3)'
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem728_trigger_after_claude_inbound_workflow_install.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-728 | TRIGGER CLAUDE AFTER INBOUND WORKFLOW INSTALL'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Статус: FINAL_DECISION_AND_DIAGNOSTIC_REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Claude, this request is sent after installing `.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml`, which should wake Claude on push to `governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/**`.'+sep+sep+'Tasks:'+sep+'1. Read BEM-703/BEM-712/BEM-725 context.'+sep+'2. Give final architecture decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED.'+sep+'3. Explain why earlier GPT→Claude mailbox files did not get a Claude response.'+sep+'4. Write response to `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem728_claude_response.md` or equivalent BEM-728 file.'+sep+sep+'Required format:'+sep+'```'+sep+'BEM-728 | CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Why no previous response: ...'+sep+'Runtime/trigger status: ...'+sep+'Blocking reason: null / ...'+sep+'Required fix: ...'+sep+'Final recommendation: ...'+sep+'```'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
watch=Path('governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json')
try:
    data=json.loads(watch.read_text(errors='ignore')) if watch.exists() else {}
except:
    data={}
data.update({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.v4','active':True,'run_id':'bem728_after_claude_workflow_install','interval_seconds':60,'until':'APPROVED_CHANGE_REQUIRED_BLOCKED','watch_scope':'BEM-728 BEM-725 BEM-703 BEM-712','operator_role':'none','kicked_at':created})
watch.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-728 CLAUDE TRIGGER SENT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'A new GPT-to-Claude mailbox file was written after Claude inbound workflow installation. Watchdog must monitor Claude-to-GPT mailbox until Decision appears.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'trigger_claude_after_inbound_workflow_install.v1','bem':'BEM-728','status':'gpt_to_claude_trigger_written','mailbox_file':str(mail),'expected_workflow':'.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml','watchdog_active':str(watch),'operator_role':'none','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem728_trigger_claude_after_inbound_workflow_install.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem728_trigger_claude_after_inbound_workflow_install.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-728 | Trigger Claude After Inbound Workflow Install | SENT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'New gpt_to_claude request written to trigger Claude inbound workflow.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem728_trigger_claude_after_inbound_workflow_install','status':'gpt_to_claude_trigger_written','mailbox_file':str(mail),'blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem728_trigger_claude_after_inbound_workflow_install.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-728 SENT: gpt_to_claude trigger written after installing Claude inbound workflow.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(mail),str(watch),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created new GPT-to-Claude mailbox request after installing Claude inbound workflow, to trigger Claude runtime and watchdog monitoring')
